description_long: This is a modern baseball cap featuring a striking color scheme of black and vivid red. The crown is predominantly black, adorned with red stitched eyelets and a red top button, providing both ventilation and a pop of color. The brim is wide, flat, and entirely red, contrasting sharply with the crown. On the front, there is a small embroidered patch in the shape of a country outline, filled in red with white script, adding a unique decorative touch. The back of the cap features an adjustable strap, also in red, for a customizable fit. The overall construction suggests a blend of durable fabric and structured panels, typical of urban streetwear.
description: A black and red baseball cap with a flat red brim, red accents, and a small embroidered patch on the front. The cap features an adjustable strap at the back and ventilating eyelets.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black crown with a red country-shaped patch and a wide, flat red brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black crown, red eyelets, and the full length of the red brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the adjustable red strap, central eyelet, and the back opening of the cap.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the black crown, red eyelets, and the red brim.
attribute_brand_or_logo: red country outline with white script
